requirement.description: The gateway shall transmit its software version information upon network startup.

test_cases.title: Verify GW_SoftwareVersion message is transmitted on startup
test_cases.precondition: Ignition OFF; Gateway powered OFF; Monitor CAN ID 0x104
test_cases.expected_result: GW_SoftwareVersion message transmitted upon network startup

test_cases.title: Verify correct transmission of software major version
test_cases.precondition: Gateway ECU powered ON after startup
test_cases.expected_result: SW_Major matches configured software major version

test_cases.title: Verify correct transmission of software minor version
test_cases.precondition: Gateway ECU powered ON after startup
test_cases.expected_result: SW_Minor matches configured software minor version

test_cases.title: Verify correct transmission of software patch version
test_cases.precondition: Gateway ECU powered ON after startup
test_cases.expected_result: SW_Patch matches configured software patch version

test_cases.title: Verify GW_SoftwareVersion transmitted only at startup
steps: Capture CAN traffic for 10 seconds after startup
test_cases.expected_result: GW_SoftwareVersion transmitted once or limited startup burst only

test_cases.title: Verify GW_SoftwareVersion DLC
Verify software version remains unchanged during operation
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_sw_007_stability(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 5.0)
    assert msgs
    first = msgs[0]
    for msg in msgs:
        assert get_sw_major(msg.data) == get_sw_major(first.data)
        assert get_sw_minor(msg.data) == get_sw_minor(first.data)
        assert get_sw_patch(msg.data) == get_sw_patch(first.data)

test_cases.title: Verify GW_SoftwareVersion retransmitted after reset
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_sw_008_reset(can_bus):
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 5.0)
    assert msgs
